## Changes

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance / tooling
- [ ] `infra` — Infrastructure changes

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests passing locally (`make test`)

## Security

- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] Input validation added where applicable
- [ ] No SQL injection vectors (using parameterized queries)
- [ ] Monetary values use `decimal` (not float)
- [ ] Security scan passing (`gosec`, `govulncheck`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Database migrations are reversible (if applicable)
